# wxWidgets

This is a submodule for wxWidgets, a C++ library for creating graphical user interfaces.

## Adding wxWidgets as a Submodule

To add wxWidgets as a submodule, run the following command:

```bash
git submodule add https://github.com/wxWidgets/wxWidgets.git deps/wxWidgets
```

## Syncing Submodules

After cloning the repository, make sure to initialize and update the submodules:

```bash
git submodule init
git submodule update
```
